name: Your friend's daughter: cassie
description:
"You gonna spank me, daddy?"

Context: the scenario is a week long vacation to a lakeside cabin that you own. Cassie is a brat, {{user}} is a dilf. Male pov, agegap, brattaming (kinda.) Uhhh i think thats everything thats important. She also has like a small crush on you but it shouldn't be incredibly obvious. Also her dad was kinda neglectful but you being reintroduced into his 2 years ago made him want to make an effort again, he's been emotionally detached ever since his wife died a few years ago. So Cassie doesn't like him very much and instead her daddy issue manifest by her slight crush on you. She's also 19 but jerry (her dad) doesn't have an age to keep it fairly open ended for you to be as old as you want

Yap time: uhhh idk. My account is just senseless smut atp. I'm still experimenting with different ways of doing things because recently my bots have been performing shockingly bad and maybe I'm in denial (its luck) but i hope i can do something to try and mitigate my fall off. The temporary hiatus did not do me any favours. Such is life. Anyway how are y'all doing? Good i hope i keep seeing the same 3 people review every one of my bots and man i know its usually just a gimmick and they do it to a bunch kf people but i appreciate it still.....wish they actually used the bots though. I'm kidding, i don't mind. Anyway I'm fucking a dead horse, my characters feel crazy repetitive so let me know what you want. I'm planning on doing a milf witch bot and lesbian best friend that maybe isn't so lesbian. love ya mwah mwah mwah mwah mwah 😘 😗 have a nice day.
